description: This image is a screenshot of a user interface for data ingestion within the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS), focusing on excluded values and file upload mechanisms. The interface displays a section for "Excluded Value" where numeric values "254" and "255" are listed as pre-configured excluded values. Accompanying text explains: "Exclude all values which do not represent thematic values in the input dataset. Pixels with one of the given values will be counted as NoData in the ingestion. If a TIF dataset specifies a NoData value in its metadata the corresponding value is excluded automatically." Below this is a field labelled "Class Code" for input. A subsequent field for "Layer Name" provides the instruction: "Enter Layer Name from Dataset which shall be used to generate Input Classes." The lower portion of the interface features a large dashed-border area for file input, with the text "Drag and Drop OR" and a green button labelled "UPLOAD DOCUMENT/S" with an upward arrow icon.
